Name: Place Worker
Description: Starting from the player adjacent the commander take turns placing your leader token to decide where you will work for resources

Name: Generate income
Description: Previous rounds Scout generates resources if alive.

Name: Buy Units and Gear
Description: Purchase Units and equipment from appropriate Shops

Name: Make Donations
Description: You can Donate Resources towards command for activating upgrades and powers

Name: Tech Draft
Description: Discard Advancement cards to bottom of the deck, draw new cards upto hands size

Name: Cycle Shops
Description: Cycle the Armory and Barracks shops to new options

Name: Assign missions
Description: Draw mission cards = players + Commander Rank, Players Draft missions starting from the reverse side of Commander

Name: New Event
Description: Draw X event cards, pick 1, place others on bottom of deck

Name: Heal Units
Description: Heal all units in the medical by X health + X for each player working there.

Name: Assign Scout
Description: Assign Groups scouts for round, this will have effects based on the scout

Name: Retreat Units
Description: You can Retreat units from combat to medical to heal wounds, until slots are full

Name: Equip Units
Description: Play equipment cards onto active units without paying equip costs

Name: Assign combatants
Description: You can freely rearrange units on the battlefield, wounded units can only move to medical or another active lane not to the bench, you may also retire units at this time

Name: Scout Enemy
Description: Deal out enemy units from the deck = difficulty, draw X cards for Scouting turn them face up and shuffle back into deck before dealing cards into lanes

Name: Upgrades
Description: Use the Commands Funds to purchase upgrades

Name: Boss Assignment
Description: Draw a boss card and roll to assign lane

Name: Lane Allocation
Description: Commander assigns players to lanes, highest rank takes command of that lane

Name: Boss Reveal
Description: Boss is revealed and any effects trigger

Name: Lane Reveal
Description: Lane enemies are revealed and effects triggered, if marked for scouting then prevent some effects

Name: Combat Start
Description: Cycle through the lanes one at a time to resolve the active units combat, if a unit dies shuffle the lane deck and assign new combatant before moving to next lane. Cycle until all lanes are clear or over run

Name: Boss encounter
Description: Depending on the boss this may trigger during main combat, otherwise place boss onto lanes, bosses count as active in all lanes and roll for target when attacking

Name: Bury the dead
Description: Move dead units and equipment to graveyard. Dead enemies goto the disposal pile, or containment if available. Keep piles in order for some effects

Name: Retire Units
Description: Return Units to the unit deck that survive combat instead of healing them or letting die

Name: Over Run
Description: if any enemies made it through regress the progress track based on the enemy rank.

Name: Check Event
Description: Resolve the Active Event

Name: Escalate
Description: Advance the progress track by 1

Name: Promote
Description: the Leader can provide +1 rank to a single player who is below the commanders rank, otherwise Commander Promotes, ONLY ON EVENT PASS

Name: Complete Missions
Description: Complete any missions that are eligible for completion

Name: Activate Gear
Description: you can activate gear on units at any time as listed

Name: Active Abilities
Description: Activate unit abilities at any time

Name: Emergency reinforcements
Description: You can assign gear to active units outside of deployment for the cards cost

Name: Activate upgrades
Description: You can play upgrades active form at any time for their cost.
